title.purpose: Current week range in the header. Also the Card Name scale at 15px/600. Most-seen text in the UI.

body.purpose: Modal supplementary prose. Rare in this UI; most text is Label or Title scale.

label.purpose: Status pills, felt buttons, week summary pills, modal section headings. All interactive labels.

mono-data.purpose: Timestamps, dates, duration badges, percentages, section dividers, HABITUAL wordmark. JetBrains Mono exclusively — never on interactive labels.

motion.name: ease-card
motion.purpose: Card hover and status state transitions. 150ms.

motion.name: ease-progress
motion.purpose: Progress bar width change only. 400ms. Width is the only animated layout value in the system.

motion.name: modal-blur
motion.purpose: Modal overlay structural separation. Used exactly once; not a decoration pattern.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile-to-desktop pivot. Below: bottom tab bar, full-width session cards, bottom-sheet modal. Above: sidebar layout, centered dialog modal, inline desktop tab switcher.

components.name: Session Card
components.description: Primary unit of the interface. Tapping opens the Session Modal. Quick-done circle toggles done/pending inline without opening modal.
components.html:
Tuesday 5-a-side
20:00 – 21:00
components.css: .ds-session-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 14px; background: #00131d; border: 1.5px solid #c1121f; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.2s; } .ds-session-card:hover { background: #001c2b; } .ds-session-card:active { opacity: 0.75; } .ds-session-card__dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-session-card__info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-session-card__name { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #fdf0d5; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-session-card__time { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #477fa2; margin-top: 1px; } .ds-session-card__done-btn { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid oklch(0.63 0.17 150deg); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.63 0.17 150deg) 9%, transparent); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-session-card__arrow { color: #477fa2; flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 2px; }

components.name: Status Pill — Active (Done)
components.description: One of four status selectors in the Session Modal (Done, Injured, Cancelled, Pending). Active Done state shown. Active border, text, and 8% tint use the status color.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { flex: 1; padding: 8px 6px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #003049; background: transparent; color: #85afc9; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-status-pill--done { border-color: oklch(0.63 0.17 150deg); color: oklch(0.63 0.17 150deg); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.63 0.17 150deg) 8%, transparent); } .ds-status-pill:hover:not(.ds-status-pill--done) { border-color: #85afc9; color: #fdf0d5; }

components.name: Felt Button — Active
components.description: Session quality rating (Great / Good / Okay / Tough). Physical sessions only. Active state always uses Warm Gold, regardless of session type.
components.css: .ds-felt-btn { flex: 1; padding: 8px 4px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #003049; background: transparent; color: #85afc9; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-felt-btn--active { border-color: #f5ae22; color: #f5ae22; background: color-mix(in oklch, #f5ae22 14%, transparent); } .ds-felt-btn:hover:not(.ds-felt-btn--active) { border-color: #f5ae22; color: #f5ae22; }

components.name: Workout Plan Panel
components.description: Read-only exercise brief inside the Session Modal for physical sessions. Category color tints the header, detail values, and tip footer. Shown here with Strength (Warm Gold).
components.html:
Pull Day 45 min
1Pull-ups4 × max
2Weighted Pull-ups3 × 5
Squeeze at the top of every pull. Control the descent.
components.css: .ds-workout-panel { border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px solid color-mix(in oklch, #f5ae22 20%, #003049); overflow: hidden; } .ds-workout-panel__header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 14px; background: color-mix(in oklch, #f5ae22 6%, #00131d); } .ds-workout-panel__title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #fdf0d5; } .ds-workout-panel__duration { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #f5ae22; background: color-mix(in oklch, #f5ae22 12%, transparent); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-workout-panel__row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; background: #00131d; border-top: 1px solid #003049; } .ds-workout-panel__num { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #477fa2; width: 16px; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-workout-panel__name { flex: 1; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #fdf0d5; } .ds-workout-panel__detail { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #f5ae22; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-workout-panel__tip { padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-style: italic; color: #85afc9; background: color-mix(in oklch, #f5ae22 4%, #00131d); border-top: 1px solid #003049; }

components.name: Modal CTA Button
components.description: Full-width primary action on bottom-sheet modals. The only component carrying the Fire Gradient (Brick Red to Warm Gold).
components.css: .ds-modal-cta { width: 100%; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c1121f, #f5ae22); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-modal-cta:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-modal-cta:active { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-modal-cta:disabled { opacity: 0.40; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: The sole animated element. Width-only transition on fill. Fire Gradient (Brick Red to Warm Gold) — the one reward metaphor in the system.
components.css: .ds-progress-track { height: 3px; background: #003049; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #c1121f, #f5ae22); border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.4s ease; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Read-only data container in the All Time history view. JetBrains Mono value at 28px is the system's one display-scale moment.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #00131d; border: 1px solid #003049; border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px; } .ds-stat-card__value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #fdf0d5; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-card__label { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: #85afc9; margin-top: 4px; }

narrative.overview:
Habitual is a record, not a motivator. It holds what happened without comment. You open it before a session to see your plan; you open it after to mark it done. The interface asks nothing of you beyond that. A field notebook doesn't clap when you write in it.

The palette is Naval Ink: deep warm navy with a hint of the sea, topped by papaya-cream text and five bright category voices. No cold-violet surfaces. No cobalt accents. No gradient that looks like an LLM product. The physical scene forces the answer: Connor unlocks his phone post-session, tired, thumb on glass. The interface reads warm, direct, and recognisably personal — like a tool he built for himself, not one he's borrowing from a startup.

Five category colors — Brick Red (football), Warm Gold (strength), Speed Amber, Cardio Emerald, Steel Blue (language) — carry all the visual energy. Their color-mix tints extend each voice at low opacity only. Outside the five voices and their tints, the surface is near-monochrome naval blue. The red-to-gold gradient on the progress bar is the one reward metaphor — fire building as the week fills up. This system explicitly rejects: gamified fitness app chrome (MyFitnessPal, Strava), productivity SaaS aesthetic (Notion, ClickUp), and AI product palettes (cobalt-to-violet gradients, cold dark surfaces, glowing blue accents, anything that reads LLM interface).
keyCharacteristics: Naval Ink foundation: deep warm navy in four tiers, zero box-shadows
Papaya cream primary text against navy — warm and readable, not clinical white
Five closed-vocabulary category colors; only color-mix tints at 4–15% opacity extend them
Two-typeface system: Space Grotesk for UI, JetBrains Mono for data
Red-to-gold Fire Gradient as the sole reward metaphor; no other gradients
Bottom-sheet modals as the detail surface; accordion pattern retired
Touch-first: 44px+ tap targets, safe-area insets, iPhone PWA optimised

rules.name: The Five Voices Rule
rules.body: Brick Red, Warm Gold, Speed Amber, Cardio Emerald, and Steel Blue are a closed vocabulary. No sixth accent color. The only permitted extension is color-mix(in oklch, <voice> X%, transparent) at 4–15% opacity. Category colors are never repurposed for UI states outside their defined roles.

rules.name: The Fire Gradient Rule
rules.body: Exactly one gradient exists: linear-gradient(90deg, #c1121f, #f5ae22) on the progress fill; linear-gradient(135deg, #c1121f, #f5ae22) on the modal CTA. Red to gold — fire building through the week. All other surfaces and buttons are flat solids. No cobalt-to-violet, no cool gradients, nothing that reads AI.

rules.name: The Mono Reserve Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono appears only on timestamps, dates, percentages, duration badges, section dividers formatted as data headings, and the HABITUAL wordmark. All interactive labels use Space Grotesk. Mixing the two on a single interactive element is prohibited.

rules.name: The Shadow-Free Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow. Depth is surface tier only. The modal backdrop blur is structural, used exactly once, not replicated elsewhere.

dos: Do use the five category colors exactly as defined: Football #c1121f, Strength #f5ae22, Speed oklch(0.67 0.20 38deg), Cardio oklch(0.63 0.17 150deg), Language #669bbc. Their meaning is established; deviation silently breaks the vocabulary.
Do extend category colors only via color-mix(in oklch, <color> X%, transparent) at 4–15% opacity.
Do use JetBrains Mono only for data. Every interactive label uses Space Grotesk.
Do express depth through surface tier escalation only. No shadows.
Do keep tap targets at minimum 44×44px.
Do use opacity shifts (45–55%) to convey done/cancelled/skipped states.
Do treat the Session Modal as a briefing room: fast entry, clear hierarchy, fast exit.
donts: Don't add gamified elements: streaks, rings, confetti, motivational copy. Anti-references: MyFitnessPal, Strava.
Don't use the productivity SaaS aesthetic: light theme, card grids, hero-metric templates. Anti-references: Notion, ClickUp.

Don't use any palette that reads AI product: cobalt-to-violet gradients, cold blue-purple dark surfaces, glowing accents. Anti-reference: Cursor, Perplexity, any LLM interface. The app uses AI as a tool; it must not look like one.
Don't add a sixth category color or repurpose the existing five for new UI states.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). The Fire Gradient lives on the progress fill and CTA only.
Don't use glassmorphism beyond the modal overlay blur.
Don't use box-shadow for any purpose.
Don't open session detail inline. The accordion pattern is retired.
Don't replicate the full-border category-color card pattern on new components without deliberate review.
